storyBeat: 父親再婚 — 新家有兩個姊姊

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: Tonight's story has a few new words. Let's learn them first!
questions.sentenceZh: 今晚的故事會用到幾個新字，我們先把它們學會！
questions.explanationZh: 奶奶說：今晚要講灰姑娘的故事，先來認識幾個關鍵字，記住了故事更好聽喔！

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Match each Chinese word to its English.
questions.explanationZh:
這四個字都在灰姑娘的故事裡：
🔑 dress = 禮服
🔑 shoe = 鞋子
🔑 dance = 跳舞
🔑 prince = 王子

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Four more words — can you match them all?
questions.explanationZh:
再來四個：
🔑 mirror = 鏡子
🔑 ribbon = 緞帶
🔑 midnight = 午夜
🔑 magic = 魔法

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Which one is a shoe?
questions.question: Which one is a shoe?
questions.explanationZh: 鞋子的英文是 shoe 👠！故事裡灰姑娘掉了一隻玻璃鞋，王子就靠這隻鞋找到她。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Which one shows a mirror?
questions.question: Which one shows a mirror?
questions.explanationZh: mirror = 鏡子 🪞！故事裡兩個姊姊對著鏡子試緞帶、換禮服，開心地準備去舞會。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The two sisters danced in front of the mirror.
questions.sentenceZh: 兩個姊姊在鏡子前面跳舞。
questions.question: Which picture matches the sentence?
options: two girls reading books at a table
two girls dancing in front of a mirror
an old woman cooking by the fire
a girl sitting alone on the floor
optionsZh: 兩個女孩坐在桌邊看書
兩個女孩在鏡子前面跳舞
一位老婦人在火爐邊煮飯
一個女孩獨自坐在地上
questions.explanationZh: dance = 跳舞，mirror = 鏡子——句子說她們在鏡子前跳舞，正好是圖中的場景！

storyBeat: 灰塵堆 — 她哭給誰聽?

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: A few more words to learn — then the story begins!
questions.sentenceZh: 再記幾個字，故事就要開始了！
questions.explanationZh: 奶奶說：再學幾個重要的字，學會了，故事就更好懂囉！

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Match each Chinese phrase to its English.
questions.explanationZh:
這四個片語都出現在灰姑娘的故事裡：
🔑 glass shoe = 玻璃鞋
🔑 gold coach = 金馬車
🔑 fairy godmother = 仙女教母
🔑 grand ball = 舞會

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The prince held the glass shoe in his hands.
questions.sentenceZh: 王子雙手捧著那只玻璃鞋。
questions.question: Which picture matches 'a glass shoe'?
options: a small shiny shoe made of glass
a tall prince in a long red coat
a round gold coin on a table
a big key hanging on a wall
optionsZh: 一位穿紅色長外套的高挑王子
一枚放在桌上的圓金幣
一把掛在牆上的大鑰匙
questions.explanationZh: glass shoe = 玻璃鞋 👠！王子帶著那只玻璃鞋，走遍全鎮，找那個穿得上的女孩。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The clock struck midnight and the magic ended.
questions.question: Which emoji shows midnight?
questions.explanationZh: midnight = 午夜 🕛！12 點鐘聲一響，魔法就結束——灰姑娘要趕快跑回家！

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The prince ___ with Cinderella all night.
questions.question: Which word is correct?
questions.explanationZh: 故事是過去發生的事，「王子和灰姑娘跳了整晚的舞」要用過去式——dance → danced！

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Match each Chinese word to its English.
questions.explanationZh:
複習一下今晚的生字：
🔑 dress = 禮服
🔑 mirror = 鏡子
🔑 midnight = 午夜
🔑 magic = 魔法
全記住了嗎？故事開始囉！

storyBeat: 舞會公告 — 她也可以去嗎?

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Here are 4 words you will meet in tonight's story.
questions.explanationZh:
快認識這節的生字！
🔑 king = 國王
🔑 ball = 舞會
🔑 town = 城鎮
🔑 help = 幫忙
記住了，繼續聽故事！

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The king's son was going to have a big ball.
questions.explanationZh: 消息傳來了——國王的兒子，也就是王子，要辦一場盛大的舞會！

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: He wanted to find a wife. Every girl in town was asked.
questions.question: Why did the prince hold the ball?
options: so he could choose a bride
to sell food to the town
optionsZh: 為了把食物賣給鎮上的人
questions.explanationZh: 王子辦舞會是為了 find a wife——找一個新娘，就是「為了選出新娘」！
questions.sentenceZh: 他想找一個妻子。鎮上每個女孩都收到了邀請。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The two sisters bought new gowns. They laughed and danced.
questions.explanationZh: 兩個姊姊高興壞了！買新禮服、又跳又笑，家裡鬧哄哄的。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: They turned in the mirror. They tried each ribbon.
questions.questionEn: Were the two sisters excited for the ball?
questions.explanationZh: 對著鏡子轉圈、每條緞帶都要試——舞會還沒開始，她們的心早就飛過去了。答 Yes。
questions.sentenceZh: 她們在鏡子前轉圈圈，每條緞帶都要試試看。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Cinderella helped them dress for the big night.
questions.explanationZh: 灰姑娘呢？她幫姊姊們梳頭、換衣服，默默地忙進忙出。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: She tied their hair and washed their shoes for hours.
questions.question: How did Cinderella help her sisters?
questions.explanationZh: 綁頭髮、洗鞋子——各種雜事全是她做，是「做了很多小事」！
questions.sentenceZh: 她幫她們綁頭髮、洗鞋子，忙了好幾個小時。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: She looked at the new gowns with quiet eyes.
questions.explanationZh: 她靜靜地看著那些漂亮的新禮服……那雙眼睛裡，藏著多少話呢？

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: But she could not go. She had no gown.
questions.question: Why could Cinderella not go to the ball?
options: she was far too sleepy to go
her father told her to stay
she had nothing nice to wear
questions.explanationZh: had no gown——沒有禮服可穿，所以去不了！
questions.sentenceZh: 可是她不能去，因為她沒有禮服。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: How did Cinderella feel after the sisters left?
questions.question: How did Cinderella feel?
questions.explanationZh: 大家都去舞會了，只有她一個人留在家——難過又孤單，這心情真讓人疼。
questions.sentenceZh: 姊姊們走後，灰姑娘的心情是？

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Match the word to its meaning.
questions.explanationZh: king=國王、ball=舞會、town=城鎮、help=幫忙——記好了！

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The king's son was going to have a big ball. He wanted to find a wife. Every girl in town was asked.
questions.question: Who was invited to the ball?
options: every girl in the whole town
only girls from the richest families
just the two sisters and their friends
only girls who already owned fine gowns
optionsZh: 鎮上每一個女孩都被邀請
只有最有錢家庭的女孩
只有兩個姊姊和她們的朋友
只有已經有漂亮禮服的女孩
questions.explanationZh: Every girl in town was asked——鎮上「每一個女孩」都收到邀請，不分富貧！
questions.sentenceZh: 國王的兒子要舉辦大舞會，他想找一個妻子，鎮上每個女孩都收到了邀請。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Cinderella helped them dress for the big night.
questions.questionEn: Was Cinderella preparing herself for the ball?
questions.explanationZh: 她在幫姊姊們綁頭髮、洗鞋子——自己沒有禮服，去不了的人，不會在準備自己。答 No。
questions.sentenceZh: 灰姑娘幫姊姊們換衣服、梳頭，準備那個盛大的夜晚。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: She looked at the new gowns with quiet eyes. But she could not go. She had no gown.
questions.question: How did Cinderella feel as she watched?
questions.explanationZh: 靜靜地看著漂亮禮服，卻去不了——那雙眼睛裡滿是「好希望自己也能去」的心情。
questions.sentenceZh: 她靜靜地看著那些新禮服，但她不能去，因為她沒有禮服。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The door shut. The house went quiet. She sat down and cried.
questions.question: Why did Cinderella cry after the sisters left?
options: tired out from all the cooking she had done
a dish broke while cleaning up after supper
left behind while everyone else went to the ball
cold because the fire had gone out
optionsZh: 煮了那麼多飯，她太累了
清掃時不小心打破了盤子
大家都去了，只有她被留下來
questions.explanationZh: 門關了，屋子靜了，她哭了——因為「大家都去舞會，只有她一個人被留下來」，心裡好難過。
questions.sentenceZh: 門砰地關上，屋子靜了。她坐下來哭了。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Match the action to who did it.
questions.explanationZh: 王子辦舞會、兩姊姊買新禮服、灰姑娘幫忙梳妝打扮、最後一個人哭。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: She tied their hair and washed their shoes for hours.
questions.questionEn: Did Cinderella enjoy helping the sisters get ready?
questions.explanationZh: 她忙了好幾個小時，幫的是不曾善待她的人——這份忙碌，心裡並不輕鬆。答 No。
questions.sentenceZh: 她幫她們綁頭髮、洗鞋子，忙了好幾個小時。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The door shut. The house went quiet. She sat down and cried...
questions.explanationZh: 門「砰」地關上，屋子靜了下來。灰姑娘坐在地上，眼淚一滴一滴往下掉……

storyBeat: 仙女教母出現 — 接下來會發生什麼?

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Here are 4 words you will meet in tonight's story.
questions.explanationZh:
這節的生字快記！
🔑 old = 老
🔑 cloak = 披肩
🔑 bring = 帶來
🔑 pumpkin = 南瓜
記住這 4 個，奇蹟快要來了！

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: After the sisters left, Cinderella cried by the fire.
questions.explanationZh: 姊姊們走了，灰姑娘獨自坐在火爐旁邊，眼淚一直流……

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Her tears fell on the grey floor, soft and slow.
questions.question: How was Cinderella crying?
questions.explanationZh: soft and slow——輕輕地、慢慢地哭，就是「安靜又溫柔地哭」。
questions.sentenceZh: 她的眼淚輕輕地、慢慢地，滴在灰色的地板上。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: A kind old woman in a soft blue cloak stepped from the dark.
questions.explanationZh: 就在這時候，一個穿著淡藍色披肩的老婦人從黑暗中悄悄走出來，臉上帶著溫柔的笑。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: No door opened. No window moved.
questions.questionEn: Did the old woman come in a normal way?
questions.explanationZh: 門沒開、窗沒動，她就這樣從黑暗裡走出來——那一刻，灰姑娘知道夜晚不一樣了。答 No。
questions.sentenceZh: 沒有門打開，也沒有窗移動。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: "I am your fairy godmother. Do not cry, child."
questions.explanationZh: 「我是你的仙女教母，別哭了孩子。」那聲音溫柔極了，像一陣暖風。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Who is the kind old woman?
questions.question: Who is the old woman?
questions.explanationZh: 她自己說：「我是你的仙女教母。」——就是仙女教母！
questions.sentenceZh: 這個善良的老婦人是誰？

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: "Bring me a pumpkin, six mice, and one big rat from the yard."
questions.explanationZh: 「去院子裡，幫我拿一顆南瓜、六隻老鼠，還有一隻大鼠回來。」仙女教母說，眼神閃閃發亮。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Her voice was soft, but her eyes shone bright.
questions.question: What was the fairy godmother's manner like?
questions.explanationZh: 聲音輕柔、眼睛明亮——這就是「溫柔但堅定有力」的感覺！
questions.sentenceZh: 她聲音輕柔，但眼睛裡閃著光芒。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Cinderella ran to the yard to find them all.
questions.explanationZh: 灰姑娘趕快跑進院子，把南瓜、老鼠、大鼠全都找來了。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Match the word to its meaning.
questions.explanationZh: old=老、cloak=披肩、bring=帶來、pumpkin=南瓜——仙女教母這節的關鍵字！

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: A kind old woman in a soft blue cloak stepped from the dark. No door opened. No window moved.
questions.question: What is unusual about how the old woman appeared?
options: arriving on the back of a white horse
wearing a very bright yellow cloak
no door or window had opened when she appeared
walking in through the front door with a smile
optionsZh: 沒有開任何門或窗，她就這樣出現了
從前門走進來、臉上帶著笑
questions.explanationZh: 沒有門開、沒有窗動——她就這樣出現了，這根本不是普通人！所以最奇特的是「她沒有開任何門或窗就出現了」。
questions.sentenceZh: 一個老婦人從黑暗中走出來。沒有門開，沒有窗移動。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Her voice was soft, but her eyes shone bright.
questions.questionEn: Was the fairy godmother both gentle and powerful?
questions.explanationZh: 聲音輕柔、眼睛閃亮——仙女教母就像奶奶說的那種人：話說得溫柔，卻有著讓一切改變的力量。答 Yes。
questions.sentenceZh: 她聲音輕柔，但眼睛閃著光芒。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Cinderella ran to the yard to find the pumpkin and the mice.
questions.question: How did Cinderella react to the fairy's request?
questions.explanationZh: 仙女教母說完，灰姑娘立刻跑進院子——她「馬上跑去幫忙」，一點都沒有猶豫！
questions.sentenceZh: 灰姑娘跑到院子裡，去找南瓜、老鼠和大鼠。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The fairy _____ her hand over the pumpkin.
questions.question: Which word fits in the blank?
questions.explanationZh: 故事是過去式——「仙女把手放在南瓜上」要說 held，這是 hold 的過去式！
questions.sentenceZh: 仙女把手輕輕放在南瓜上。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The fairy held her hand over the pumpkin. The air felt warm.
questions.question: What is about to happen?
options: the pumpkin is ready to be cooked
something magical is going to begin
Cinderella is going to fall asleep
the fairy is about to leave forever
optionsZh: 某個神奇的事要開始了
仙女教母要永遠離開了
questions.explanationZh: 仙女把手放在南瓜上，空氣變暖——這是魔法要開始的徵兆，「某個神奇的事要開始了」！
questions.sentenceZh: 仙女把手放在南瓜上，空氣突然變暖了。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Match these story moments.
questions.explanationZh: 仙女從黑暗出現、灰姑娘在哭、仙女的眼睛閃光、灰姑娘跑去院子。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The fairy held her hand over the pumpkin. The air felt warm...
questions.explanationZh: 仙女教母把手輕輕放在南瓜上，空氣突然變暖了……有什麼奇妙的事，要發生了！

storyBeat: 馬車 + 鼠變馬 — 12 點限制是什麼?

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Here are 4 words you will meet in tonight's story.
questions.explanationZh:
這節的生字快學！
🔑 tap = 輕碰一下
🔑 gold = 金色
🔑 horse = 馬
🔑 end = 結束
記住這 4 個，魔法要開始了！

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The fairy godmother tapped the pumpkin one time.
questions.explanationZh: 仙女教母用魔法棒輕輕碰了南瓜一下——「叮！」

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: It became a big gold coach with shiny wheels.
questions.question: What did the pumpkin become?
options: her fine ride to the ball
questions.explanationZh: 南瓜變成了金色的大馬車——那就是帶她去舞會的「好坐騎」！
questions.sentenceZh: 它變成了一輛閃閃亮亮的大金馬車。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The six mice became six white horses.
questions.explanationZh: 六隻老鼠「咻——」地變成六匹雪白的駿馬，在夜色裡好美！

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The big rat stood up. He held a long whip in his paws.
questions.questionEn: Did the rat become a driver?
questions.explanationZh: 剛才還是院子裡的大鼠，現在站直身子、握著長鞭——魔法讓他成了馬車夫。答 Yes。
questions.sentenceZh: 那隻大鼠站了起來，兩隻爪子握著一條長鞭。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Cinderella's grey rags turned into a long silver gown.
questions.explanationZh: 灰姑娘身上的破舊灰衣「唰——」一聲，變成了一件長長的銀色禮服，好漂亮！

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: What color was Cinderella's new gown?
questions.question: What color was her new gown?
questions.explanationZh: 長長的銀色禮服——silver，就是「銀色」！
questions.sentenceZh: 灰姑娘的新禮服是什麼顏色？

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: "Come home by twelve," the fairy said.
questions.explanationZh: 「記住，12 點一定要回家。」仙女教母叮嚀她。12 點，12 點——一定要記住！

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: "The magic ends then. Everything goes back the way it was."
questions.question: What did the fairy warn about twelve o'clock?
questions.explanationZh: magic ends——魔法結束，所有東西都會變回去，就是「魔法會停」！
questions.sentenceZh: 「到那個時候，魔法就結束了，一切都會變回原來的樣子。」

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Cinderella climbed into the gold coach with bright eyes.
questions.explanationZh: 灰姑娘眼睛閃閃發亮，輕輕爬上那輛金色的大馬車！

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Match the word to its meaning.
questions.explanationZh: tap=輕碰、gold=金色、horse=馬、end=結束——這節魔法的關鍵詞！

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The pumpkin became a big gold coach. The six mice became six white horses. The big rat held a long whip.
questions.question: How did the fairy godmother create the coach?
options: brought a real coach from a faraway kingdom
turned ordinary animals and plants into magic things
asked Cinderella to buy things from the market
made Cinderella build the coach with her own hands
optionsZh: 從遙遠的王國帶來一輛真正的馬車
把普通的動植物變成神奇的東西
叫灰姑娘去市場買東西
讓灰姑娘自己動手造馬車
questions.explanationZh: 南瓜、老鼠、大鼠——這些都是普通東西，仙女教母把它們變成馬車、白馬、車夫！
questions.sentenceZh: 南瓜變成金馬車，六隻老鼠變成六匹白馬，大鼠手握長鞭成為馬車夫。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The magic ends then. Everything goes back the way it was.
questions.questionEn: Can Cinderella stay at the ball past midnight?
questions.explanationZh: 12 點魔法就結束——金馬車變回南瓜、銀禮服變回破衣，她只有 12 點前的時間屬於自己。答 No。
questions.sentenceZh: 那個時候魔法就結束了，所有東西都會變回原來的樣子。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Cinderella climbed into the gold coach with bright eyes.
questions.question: How did Cinderella feel climbing into the coach?
questions.explanationZh: 眼睛閃閃發亮——那種表情就是「充滿驚喜和喜悅」！她終於可以去了。
questions.sentenceZh: 灰姑娘眼睛閃亮，輕輕爬上那輛金色馬車。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: "Come home by twelve," the fairy said. "The magic ends then."
questions.question: What would happen if Cinderella forgot to leave by twelve?
options: the ball would go on all the way until morning
the fairy would give her even more magical things
the prince would know exactly who she truly was
she would lose her gown and coach in front of everyone
optionsZh: 舞會會一直進行到早上
仙女教母會給她更多魔法東西
王子就會知道她真正是誰
她的禮服和馬車會在眾人面前消失
questions.explanationZh: 12 點魔法結束，一切變回去——如果她沒有及時離開，「禮服和馬車會在眾人面前消失」，那就太尷尬了！
questions.sentenceZh: 「12 點前一定要回來，」仙女教母說，「那個時候魔法就結束了。」

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Match what became what.
questions.explanationZh: 南瓜變金馬車、老鼠變白馬、大鼠變車夫、破衣變銀色禮服——魔法真的好神奇！

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Cinderella's grey rags turned into a long silver gown.
questions.questionEn: Did Cinderella look the same as before after the magic?
questions.explanationZh: 剛才還是沾著灰的破衣，現在是一身銀色長禮服——連灰姑娘自己也認不出那是自己。答 No。
questions.sentenceZh: 灰姑娘身上的破灰衣變成了一件長長的銀色禮服。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Twelve. Twelve. Twelve. The number sat in her ear like a small bell...
questions.explanationZh: 12……12……12……這個數字像小鈴鐺一樣，在她耳邊輕輕響著。她，會記得嗎？

storyBeat: 12 點鐘響 — 鞋掉了 王子會找她?

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Here are 4 words you will meet in tonight's story.
questions.explanationZh:
這節的生字快記！
🔑 dance = 跳舞
🔑 clock = 時鐘
🔑 run = 跑
🔑 fall = 掉落
記住了嗎？繼續聽故事！

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: At the ball, the prince could not look away from her.
questions.explanationZh: 舞會上，王子的眼睛一直跟著她轉——他根本挪不開目光！

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: His eyes followed her every step around the room.
questions.question: How did the prince watch Cinderella?
questions.explanationZh: eyes followed every step——眼睛一直跟著她，就是「一直盯著她」！
questions.sentenceZh: 王子的眼睛跟著她的每一步，在大廳裡轉啊轉。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: They danced every dance. She forgot the time.
questions.explanationZh: 她和王子跳了一支又一支的舞，旋轉、旋轉，快樂到忘了時間……

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The fairy's warning slipped out of her mind.
questions.questionEn: Did Cinderella remember about twelve o'clock?
questions.explanationZh: 音樂太美、王子就在旁邊——仙女教母的叮嚀悄悄從心裡溜走了，再也記不起來。答 No。
questions.sentenceZh: 仙女教母的叮嚀，從她腦子裡悄悄溜走了。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The clock began to strike twelve.
questions.explanationZh: 「噹——噹——噹——」時鐘開始敲響——12 點！

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: What time was it when the clock struck?
questions.question: What time was it?
questions.explanationZh: strike twelve——就是「半夜 12 點」！
questions.sentenceZh: 時鐘敲響的時候，是幾點？

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: She ran for the door as fast as she could.
questions.explanationZh: 「噹！」她突然清醒——拔腿就跑，往大門衝過去！

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Her heart beat hard. Her silver gown flew behind her.
questions.question: How did Cinderella leave the ball?
questions.explanationZh: 心跳猛、禮服往後飛——這就是「匆匆忙忙衝出去」的樣子！
questions.sentenceZh: 她的心臟砰砰跳，銀色禮服在身後飄飛。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: One small fur slipper fell off on the stair.
questions.explanationZh: 跑下樓梯的時候，「啪嗒！」一隻小小的毛皮鞋掉在台階上。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Match the word to its meaning.
questions.explanationZh: dance=跳舞、clock=時鐘、run=跑、fall=掉落——這節的關鍵詞！

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: At the ball, the prince could not look away from her. They danced every dance. She forgot the time.
questions.question: Why did Cinderella forget about twelve o'clock?
options: the fairy godmother came to say it was fine
she had already decided not to go home
someone hid all the clocks at the ball
she was too happy dancing with the prince
optionsZh: 仙女教母來說沒關係了
有人把舞會裡所有時鐘都藏起來
她跟王子跳舞跳得太開心了
questions.explanationZh: 跳了一支又一支的舞，開心到失去時間感——她「跟王子跳舞太開心，忘記時間了」！
questions.sentenceZh: 在舞會上，王子的眼睛一直看著她，他們跳了每一支舞，她忘記了時間。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: She ran for the door as fast as she could.
questions.questionEn: Did Cinderella leave the ball in a calm and relaxed way?
questions.explanationZh: 鐘聲一響，她拔腿就跑，心跳快得要命——哪裡有時間從容地道別。答 No。
questions.sentenceZh: 她跑向大門，跑得越快越好。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: One small fur slipper fell off on the stair. The slipper stayed there alone.
questions.question: What does the lost slipper mean for the story?
options: 👠 a clue the prince can use to find her
🧹 something Cinderella needs to clean up
🎁 a gift she left for the prince on purpose
🏃 proof she could run very fast
optionsZh: 👠 王子可以用來找到她的線索
🧹 灰姑娘需要回去打掃的東西
🎁 她故意留給王子的禮物
🏃 證明她跑得很快的證據
questions.explanationZh: 那隻孤孤單單的鞋留在台階上——它會成為王子找到她的「線索」！
questions.sentenceZh: 她跑下樓梯時，一隻小小的毛皮鞋掉在台階上，孤孤單單地留在那裡。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Her heart beat hard. Her silver gown flew behind her. One small fur slipper fell off on the stair.
questions.question: What did Cinderella leave behind?
options: her silver gown near the front door
a small shoe on the palace steps
the gold coach outside the palace
the pumpkin she used for the carriage
optionsZh: 她的銀色禮服在前門附近
一隻小鞋子在宮殿台階上
questions.explanationZh: 跑著跑著，一隻毛皮鞋掉在台階上——她留下的就是「一隻小鞋子在宮殿台階上」！
questions.sentenceZh: 她的心跳猛，銀色禮服往後飛，一隻小毛皮鞋掉在台階上。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Match these story events.
questions.explanationZh: 王子目不轉睛、灰姑娘忘了時間、時鐘敲響、鞋子掉在台階——這節的四大重點！

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The fairy's warning slipped out of her mind.
questions.questionEn: Did Cinderella remember the fairy's warning while she was dancing?
questions.explanationZh: 跳舞跳得那麼開心，叮嚀早就飛走了——等她想起來，時鐘已經開始敲了。答 No。
questions.sentenceZh: 仙女教母的叮嚀，從她腦子裡悄悄溜走了。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The slipper stayed there alone. The night went still...
questions.explanationZh: 那隻鞋孤伶伶地留在台階上，夜，安靜了下來……王子看著那隻鞋，心裡在想什麼？

storyBeat: 鞋滑上腳 — 仙女教母在哪? 善良才是真正的魔法

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Here are 4 words you will meet in tonight's story.
questions.explanationZh:
最後一節的生字！
🔑 hold = 拿住
🔑 look = 尋找
🔑 foot = 腳
🔑 hand = 手
記住這 4 個，故事要到最後了！

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The prince held the slipper. He looked all over the country.
questions.explanationZh: 王子捧著那隻小鞋，走遍了整個國家——他要找到那個失去鞋子的人！

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: He stopped at every door, big or small.
questions.question: How did the prince look for her?
questions.explanationZh: stopped at every door——每一扇門都去敲，就是「拜訪了很多家」！
questions.sentenceZh: 他走到每一戶人家門口，大門小門都敲。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: He came to her house. The two sisters tried the slipper.
questions.explanationZh: 王子來到她家了——兩個姊姊搶著試那隻鞋，用力擠，拼命塞……

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: They pushed and pulled. Their toes would not fit.
questions.questionEn: Did the slipper belong to one of the sisters?
questions.explanationZh: 推啊拉啊，腳趾塞不進去——這隻鞋只認得一個人的腳。答 No。
questions.sentenceZh: 她們用力推、用力拉，腳趾頭就是擠不進去。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Cinderella came in quietly. She set her foot in the slipper.
questions.explanationZh: 灰姑娘輕輕走進來，安安靜靜地坐下，把腳放進那隻小鞋裡……

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: It slid on like water on a smooth stone.
questions.question: How did the slipper fit Cinderella?
questions.explanationZh: 像水流過石頭一樣順——那就是「完美合腳、剛剛好」！
questions.sentenceZh: 鞋子滑上她的腳，像水流過光滑的石頭一樣順。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The prince knew her at once. He took her hand.
questions.explanationZh: 王子一眼就認出了她，走過來，輕輕握住她的手。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: How did Cinderella treat her sisters in the end?
questions.question: How did Cinderella treat her sisters?
questions.explanationZh: Perrault 的故事裡，灰姑娘原諒了姊姊們——她是用「溫柔善待」她們！
questions.sentenceZh: 最後，灰姑娘怎麼對待兩個姊姊？

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: She was kind, even to her two sisters.
questions.explanationZh: 她連對那兩個姊姊，都以善意相待。善良，才是她真正的力量。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Match the word to its meaning.
questions.explanationZh: hold=拿住、foot=腳、hand=手、look=尋找——故事最後的關鍵詞！

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The prince held the slipper. He looked all over the country. He stopped at every door, big or small.
questions.question: What does the prince's search show about him?
options: wanting to return a lost slipper to its owner
truly wanted to find the girl he had danced with
enjoying a ride around the whole countryside
looking for someone to fix his palace roof
optionsZh: 只是想把遺失的鞋還給主人
他真的很想找到那個跟他跳舞的女孩
享受騎馬遊覽整個鄉村
在找人幫他修宮殿屋頂
questions.explanationZh: 拿著鞋走遍全國、每扇門都敲——這說明他「真的很想找到那個跟他跳舞的女孩」！
questions.sentenceZh: 王子捧著鞋，走遍全國，每一扇門都去敲。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: They pushed and pulled. Their toes would not fit.
questions.questionEn: Was it easy for the sisters to try on the slipper?
questions.explanationZh: 推啊拉啊，還是進不去——鞋子記得舞會那夜，只有一雙腳才穿得進。答 No。
questions.sentenceZh: 她們用力推用力拉，但腳趾頭就是擠不進去。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: It slid on like water on a smooth stone. The prince knew her at once.
questions.question: How did the prince react when the shoe fit perfectly?
options: 😴 felt too tired to keep looking
💡 knew right away she was the one
optionsZh: 💡 馬上就知道她就是那個人
questions.explanationZh: 鞋子完美合腳，王子「一眼就認出了她」——knew her at once，就是「馬上知道她就是那個人」！
questions.sentenceZh: 鞋子滑上她的腳，像水流過光滑石頭一樣順。王子一眼就認出了她。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: She was kind, even to her two sisters. And the fairy godmother? Gone with the wind.
questions.question: What is the true magic in this story?
options: the slipper that fit only Cinderella's foot
the pumpkin coach that took her to the ball
the prince's search across the whole country
Cinderella's own kindness was her greatest power
optionsZh: 只有灰姑娘才穿得進去的小鞋
帶她去舞會的金南瓜馬車
灰姑娘自己的善良，才是她最大的力量
questions.explanationZh: 仙女消失了，馬車也不見了——但故事說「真正的魔法一直在她善良的心裡」，所以是她的善良！
questions.sentenceZh: 她連對兩個姊姊都溫柔相待。仙女教母呢？已隨風消散。真正的魔法，從來都在她心裡。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Match the character to their action at the end.
questions.explanationZh: 王子拿鞋、兩姊姊穿不進、灰姑娘完美合腳、灰姑娘到最後還是善良的！

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The prince knew her at once. He took her hand.
questions.questionEn: Did the prince need a long time to recognize Cinderella?
questions.explanationZh: knew her at once——跳舞那夜的眼神，王子怎麼可能忘？一眼就是她。答 No。
questions.sentenceZh: 王子一眼就認出了她，走過來握住她的手。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: And the fairy godmother? Gone with the wind. The real magic was inside her all along...
questions.explanationZh: 那仙女教母呢？她早就隨風消散了。真正的魔法，從來都藏在灰姑娘善良的心裡——一直都在。
